content.en:
The ruins of reincarnation.

Ye Tian's replica body is here to find more resources.

Useful resources aren't easy to find, though.

Many treasure lands have been occupied by major forces, and magic circles have been arranged, declaring that they are theirs, and if they force their way in, they will undoubtedly offend them.

And the treasure land that is not occupied, the resources are also very scarce, and there are no good things.

But if you rely on a long period of time to find it slowly, you can still find a little resource.

this day.

Ye Tian knew about a reincarnation ruin treasure land from other Origin Upper Realm overlords, and there were a lot of good things in it, but this reincarnation ruin treasure land was very dangerous, and ordinary Origin Upper Realm overlords did not dare to enter it.

After Ye Tian learned about it, he naturally came over.

......

"Domain!"

This is a very special treasure place in the ruins of reincarnation, the sense of time and space distortion is extremely terrifying, and even the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm has a very terrifying distortion, once inside, the direction is completely lost, and it must be marked to be easy to come out of it.

And.

The danger of the Origin Upper Realm is that there is a kind of Origin Upper Realm Overlord level race living in it-the Snake, this kind of Snake often appears suddenly, and the Snake in the Domain is comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened five or six times.

The point is, even if you kill the snake, after a long time, a new snake will be born.

Once upon a time, a group of Origin Upper Realm Overlords entered here, paid the price of the fall of six Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and killed all the snakes, but after many years, these snakes reappeared.

Therefore, later, there was no Origin Upper Realm Overlord to join forces to clean up the snakes here.

However, there are indeed a lot of resources in the Domain, except for the time when the resources were swept away in the distant years, many resources have naturally been born now, among which there are treasures that help the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm to improve the Origin Rules of the other side.

If he's lucky, there's nothing wrong with helping him raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to a ten-percent realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Wei Domain, and suddenly a distorted feeling came, making his consciousness a little confused, and it took a while to regain his balance.

"The sense of distortion is indeed terrifying, even if the perception is turned off, this sense of distortion will still be transmitted to the depths of the will, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm who is too weak, I am afraid that he will not be able to move when he enters here, he will have to go crazy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It took him a moment to regain control of his body and adjust his senses, so that he could use his strength here.

Subsequently.

He began to search for treasure resources.

But soon, he encountered a snake.

The snake is very fast, and its body is exactly the same color as the snake domain, so it is almost impossible to see, and it is difficult to perceive.

However, for Ye Tian, there was naturally no problem when he saw the snake.

Rumble!!!

After the snake found Ye Tian, he thought that Ye Tian was an intruder and directly attacked Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

The surrounding time and space began to condense into prisons, and endless prisons were superimposed.

This is a means of the snake!

"Broken!"

Ye Tian held the high-level Beyond Treasure Spear, urged the body of reincarnation Haotian, and performed the top-of-the-line Beyond Shore Supreme Technique-the Beyond Shore Slashing Technique, shattering the endless space-time prison with a fierce blow, and immediately fought with this snake.

The strength of this snake is not strong, it is weaker than Ye Tian.

Soon, however, the snake became a helper.

Airplanes!!!!

One snake after another appeared all around.

Abrupt.

Rumble!!!!!

An incomparably terrifying snake appeared, and the strength of this snake was more than ten times stronger than that of other snakes.

In a flash.

Ye Tian was hit through his body by a ray of light released by the other party, and although he had not yet fallen, he had already been severely injured.

After a while, Ye Tian was killed by these snakes.

......

"The Origin Domain is really dangerous, these Snakes will find each other's help, it is easy to be besieged, even if it is the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has awakened the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side two or three times, he can't withstand this kind of siege!"

Ye Tian knew that if he copied his body with his real body to break through, it would take a long time, and he might not find anything good, and even if he did, it would be easy not to bring it out.

Thereupon.

He decided to copy the weakest snake and use the snake's body to enter the snake domain to find treasure resources, so there should be no problem.

Subsequently.

And that's what he did.

Slowly, a snake copied its body and copied it successfully.

After that, he entered the Realm with this snake replicating body.

This time, he was not besieged and began to slowly search for resources.

It's been a long time since the Origin Upper Realm Overlord has entered here to look for resources, so there are still quite a few resources here.

Soon, he found something good.

"Reincarnation Blood Dragon Flower, this is a good thing, it has some help to comprehend the original rules of the other side! There are dozens of plants growing here, all of them are mine!"

Ye Tian took away all these reincarnation blood dragon flowers.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian took away all kinds of resources, some of which were occupied by some powerful snakes, and he couldn't get rid of them, but he took away the resources he could.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained more and more resources.

And with the help of these resources, his other side origin is getting stronger and stronger, and the other side origin rules are about to be broken again.

About 1.3 million years after the Archean era.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already left the Wei Domain, after all, all the resources that could be found had been found, and with the help of these massive resources, Ye Tian's other side origin rules had finally broken through on this day.

Rumble!!!!!

The rules of the other side of the origin have broken through to the realm of ninety percent and nine, and the other side of the origin has skyrocketed, and the strength has increased again.

"It's very good, if you improve your cultivation again, and if you break through a little more, you have to face which path to take!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He continued to practice penance, and his strength was slowly improving.

Before you know it, more than three million primeval epochs have passed.

This is a long time for Ye Tian.

And with the help of sufficient resources, Ye Tian's other side of the origin rules broke through again.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's other shore origin rules have completely reached the ten-percent perfection realm, and his other shore origin has also reached the limit, and his physical body has also reached the limit with the help of many resources.

At this moment, he has reached his current limit and is faced with the problem of choosing a path!
